title: Matrices, Job Dependencies, Outputs, and Immutable Artifacts · Delivery Incident Triage
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective matrix and artifact handoff contract; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in matrices, job dependencies, outputs, and immutable artifacts, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in matrix and artifact handoff contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Design include and exclude rules, experimental axes, fail-fast, max-parallel, names, and support-policy coverage without combinatorial waste.
Trace needs dependencies, job results, always and failure conditions, skipped ancestors, and cleanup behavior through a directed graph.
Write multiline-safe step outputs, promote validated job outputs, handle size and secret redaction limits, and parse downstream types explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Ci Matrix Axis Coverage

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity-1kp60f". Tailor its handoff-contract.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity, keep Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity-1kp60f
  - competency: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity
    artifact: handoff-contract.yaml
    decision: artifact download permission integrity
    environment: sandbox Google Cloud project with a private Cloud Run service
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: job result dependency graph exact command and first causal failure
    case-key: 1kp60f
    change: |
      matrix: node-22-24-by-ubuntu-macos-windows
      experimental: continue-only-declared-axis
      max-parallel: bounded
      needs: explicit-dag
      outputs: validated-json
      artifact-name: build-linux-x64-run8842
      artifact-digest: sha256-verified
      retention-days: 7
      hidden-files: excluded
    verify: enumerate matrix cases trace job results parse outputs and verify artifact ID digest layout retention and producer
    failure: Reject silent coverage exclusions, output type assumptions, artifact name reuse, hidden secret upload, or download as execution trust.
    repair: Prove matrix coverage, validate outputs, use unique immutable artifacts, verify digests and permissions, and bound retention.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
